Recipes

Wassail

Ingredients:

  • 1 gal. apple cider
  • 6 oz. orange juice
  • 4 oz. cranberry juice
  • 2 oz. lemon juice
  • 1/4 c. sugar
  • 3-5 sticks cinnamon
  • 4-6 whole cloves

Instructions:

Simmer all ingredients together for a while.

NOTE: A bunch of links around the site are dead. I'm working on fixing them!
